subcodes.first_line: O ye who stand fast and firm in the Covenant! No sooner had the Most Great Luminary of the world risen above the horizon of Iraq
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر میثاق نیر اعظم اشراق چون از افق عراق طلوع فرمود و پرتوی نورانی از
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @growth of the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat], @rejection, opposition and persecution, @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @predictions and prophecies
